Rust Lang Hoodie

Local fixture product page.

Reviews

Ava ★★★★★

Warm and comfortable. The fit is true to size. Would buy again.

Noah ★★★★☆

Nice fabric and stitching. The hood is a little large but overall great.

Mia ★★★★★

Perfect for cold mornings. The print looks durable after several washes.

Liam ★★★☆☆

Good hoodie, but the sleeves run slightly short for me.
